value.rationale: The page explicitly offers Claude as a web product (with "Try Claude" call-to-action buttons), a desktop app (downloadable for macOS and Windows), and a mobile app (available on Apple App Store and Google Play). This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude across web, desktop, and mobile platforms.
